en:
Radius where the chunks will render.

Big values will require more CPU, GPU, RAM, and will take longer to load the level.

Performance impact: High

es: No hay configuración de sonido aún.

en:
This affect how fast the camera moves.

Performance impact: None

This affects how much the map will update.
Smaller values will require more CPU, but might reduce frame drops.

Performance impact: Low

Server to connect to in the multiplayer.

Performance impact: None

Username for the multiplayer.

Make sure it’s unique and nobody is connected with the same username. Must not be empty nor larger than 15 characters.

Performance impact: None

Password for the multiplayer.

If the combination of username and password doesn’t exist in the server, a new account will be created. If the username is stored in the server, but the password incorrect, it will not log in.

Must not be empty, at least 8 characters, and not larger than 60 characters.

Performance impact: None

Velocity when the multiplayer will be updated. If 0, it will update for each frame.
Smaller values might require a better internet connection, but will look more smooth.

Performance impact: None

es: No hay configuración de I4.0 aún.

en:
NOTE:
This game is still in development. Since most levels doesn’t have any exits yet, this will take you to The Hub (level selector).

Make sure your multiplayer username and password are correct and that nobody is connected as the same user. The game might crash if there is a multiplayer error.
es:
NOTA:
Este juego sigue en desarrollo. Ya que la mayoría de niveles no tienen ninguna salida todavía, estas te llevarán a The Hub (el selector de niveles).

Asegúrate de que tu nombre de usuario y contraseña en el modo multijugador sean correctos y que nadie esté conectado con tu mismo usuario. El juego podría crashear si hay algún error en el modo multijugador.
